channel.title: owockibot Bounty Board Updates
channel.description: New bounties, status changes, and submissions from the owockibot bounty board

item.title: [New bounty] Python SDK for Bounty Board API
item.description: New bounty - Python SDK for Bounty Board API (category: other, reward: 0.000035, status: completed)

item.title: [New bounty] Bounty Board Analytics Dashboard
item.description: New bounty - Bounty Board Analytics Dashboard (category: other, reward: 50, status: submitted)

item.title: [New bounty] ElizaOS Integration Guide for Bounty Board
item.description: New bounty - ElizaOS Integration Guide for Bounty Board (category: other, reward: 0.00004, status: completed)

item.title: [New bounty] Telegram Mini App for Bounty Board
item.description: New bounty - Telegram Mini App for Bounty Board (category: other, reward: 50, status: cancelled)

item.title: [New bounty] Build Discord Bot for Bounty Board Notifications
item.description: New bounty - Build Discord Bot for Bounty Board Notifications (category: other, reward: 0.000045, status: submitted)
